class.name: Warmage
class.description: The undisputed masters of cantrips, Warmages turn the most fundamental types of magic into a deadly and precise art. They are masterful strategists and tacticians who treat magic as a weapon to be perfected through discipline and aptitude.
tool_proficiencies: One gaming set of your choice

starting_equipment.items: Leather Armor, Dagger, Arcane Focus (Staff), Gaming Set of your choice, Explorer’s Pack and 22 GP

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: You use Intelligence as your spellcasting ability and an Arcane Focus. You start with four Warmage cantrips. When you cast a Warmage cantrip, it counts as a spell of a level equal to half your Warmage level (max level 9) for Dispel Magic.

class_features.name: Arcane Initiation
class_features.description: Choose how you first learned magic (Adventurer, Arcane Event, Circus Performer, Mercenary, Temple Initiate, Tower Apprentice, Self-Taught, or Survivalist). You gain two specific cantrips and proficiency in one specific skill based on your choice.

class_features.name: Warmage Edge
class_features.description: Once per turn when you cast a Warmage cantrip, you add your Intelligence modifier to one damage roll. Starting at level 5, you add extra Cantrip Bonus Dice to the damage roll as shown in the class table.

class_features.name: Reliable Cantrip
class_features.description: When you miss an attack roll or a target succeeds on a save against your Warmage cantrip, the target takes the cantrip's minimum damage (if any). You can apply Warmage Edge to this damage.

class_features.name: Warmage Tricks
class_features.description: You learn two tricks that alter your combat and spellcasting. You gain more tricks at higher levels as shown in the class table.

class_features.name: Warmage Subclass
class_features.description: You gain a Warmage subclass of your choice, granting features at levels 3, 7, 10, 15, and 18.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: You gain the Ability Score Improvement feat or another feat for which you qualify. You gain this feature again at levels 8, 12, and 16.

class_features.name: Arcane Surge
class_features.description: Once per turn when you deal damage with a Warmage cantrip, you can double the damage dice (or triple if it was already a Critical Hit). You have 2 uses (3 at level 11), regaining one on a Short Rest and all on a Long Rest.

class_features.name: Tactical Insight
class_features.description: You gain a bonus to saving throws against spells and other magical effects equal to your Intelligence modifier (minimum +1). This does not apply to Intelligence saving throws.

class_features.name: Strategic Deflection
class_features.description: When you succeed on a saving throw against a spell, you can use a Reaction to redirect the spell's energy to a new target within the spell's range or 30 feet. The new target must save against your spell save DC or suffer the spell's effects. Once per Short or Long Rest.

class_features.name: Epic Boon
class_features.description: You gain an Epic Boon feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify.

class_features.name: Master Warmage
class_features.description: Whenever you roll Initiative and have no uses of Arcane Surge left, you regain one expended use.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: You gain spell slots to cast level 1+ Wizard spells. You use Intelligence as your spellcasting ability. You can use Warmage Edge to improve the damage of these spells.

features.name: Arcane Study
features.description: Gain proficiency in two skills: Arcana, History, Investigation, Medicine, or Religion.

features.name: Mystical Companion
features.description: You always have Find Familiar prepared. You can choose special forms: Imp, Pseudodragon, Quasit, or Sprite.

features.name: Siege Casting
features.description: Your spells deal double damage to objects and structures. You have Advantage on spell attacks against targets 100+ feet away.

features.name: Spell Sculpting
features.description: When casting a spell with a slot, you can choose allies (up to Int mod) to automatically succeed on their saves and take no damage.

features.name: Arcane Dominance
features.description: Bonus Action: Expend spell slots with a combined level of 6+ to regain one use of Arcane Surge.

features.name: Bluff
features.description: Gain proficiency in Deception and Playing Cards. Add Int mod to Deception checks.

features.name: Deck of Fate
features.description: Draw 5 cards on Initiative. Bonus Action: Play cards to match 'Hands' (Pair, Flush, etc.) to enhance a damage-dealing Warmage spell.

features.name: High Stakes
features.description: Discard cards and draw back to 5, losing 2 HP per card chosen.

features.name: Dealer's Choice
features.description: Bonus Action: Gain Resistance, Teleportation, or enter a Demiplane (GM's choice).

features.name: Card Reading
features.description: Once per turn when drawing, guess the suit. If correct, take Dash, Disengage, or Utilize as part of the same Bonus Action.

features.name: Ace in the Hole
features.description: Whenever you draw cards, draw twice as many and keep half.

features.name: Magic Daggers
features.description: You learn the Magic Daggers cantrip.

features.name: Trick Shot
features.description: Add or subtract a d4 from a ranged attack roll (Int mod uses per rest).

features.name: Bullseye
features.description: Record d20 rolls on ranged spell attacks. If you roll a recorded number again within 1 minute, gain extra damage, recovery, or a reroll.

features.name: Dagger Climb
features.description: Cast Magic Daggers to gain a Climb Speed equal to your Speed for 10 minutes.

features.name: Intercepting Shot
features.description: Reaction: Use Magic Daggers to reduce an incoming attack roll by 5.

features.name: Vanishing Toss
features.description: Replace a Magic Daggers attack with a teleportation dagger. Bonus Action: Teleport to the dagger (500ft range).

features.name: Dart Burst
features.description: Action: Clear 10+ unique Bullseye numbers to deal 1d8 Force damage per number in a 60ft cone. Once per Long Rest.

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features.description: Gain proficiency in Sleight of Hand and Dice Sets.

features.name: Dice of Fate
features.description: Gain four d6 Dice of Fate. Expend to add to a failed D20 test or damage roll. Expended dice go to the GM to use against you.

features.name: Chaos Roll
features.description: Magic Action: Expend 2 Dice of Fate to roll on the Chaos Roll table for random magical effects.

features.name: Loaded Dice
features.description: Once per turn, flip a d6 to its opposite side (e.g., 1 becomes 6).

features.name: Twisted Fate
features.description: Bonus Action: Expend a Die of Fate to ignore Disadvantage (on 5) or gain Advantage (on 6).

features.name: Roll the Bones
features.description: Reaction (when damaged): Expend 2 Dice of Fate to make a Chaos Roll.

features.name: Steal Luck
features.description: On Initiative, roll a d6 and steal that many Dice of Fate back from the GM.

features.name: Martial Training
features.description: Gain proficiency with Martial weapons, Medium armor, and Shields.

features.name: Battle Tactics
features.description: Gain Battle Dice (d6s) and maneuvers (Blitz, Check, Gambit, etc.). Regain dice on Initiative or Rest.

features.name: Lead from the Front
features.description: Difficult terrain costs no extra movement for you or allies within 120 feet.

features.name: Tactical Master
features.description: Allies within 10 feet add your Intelligence modifier to saves against spells.

features.name: Checkmate [Maneuver]
features.description: Bonus Action (on hit): Direct an ally to strike as a Reaction, adding a Battle Die to their damage.

features.name: Grandmaster
features.description: On Initiative, give allies Battle Dice to add to failed D20 tests.

features.name: Martial Training
features.description: Gain proficiency with Martial weapons and all armor/shields. Ignore Strength requirements for Heavy armor/weapons.

features.name: Mystical Armament
features.description: Learn Force Buckler and one blade cantrip (Arc Blade, etc.).

features.name: Manifest Weapon
features.description: Bonus Action: Create a force weapon. Use Intelligence for attack/damage rolls. Deals Force damage.

features.name: Fighting Style
features.description: Gain a Fighting Style feat of your choice.

features.name: Knight's Ward
features.description: Bonus Action: Gain Temporary HP equal to twice your level. Once per Short/Long Rest.

features.name: Tactical Maneuver
features.description: Teleport up to 30 feet by spending movement.

features.name: Field of Blades
features.description: Magic Action: Make a melee spell attack against up to 5 creatures within 30 feet for 2d10 + Int Force damage.

features.name: Promotion
features.description: After a Long Rest, choose Adaptive Magic (extra trick/cantrip) or Martial Training (Martial weapons, Medium armor, Shields).

features.name: Pawn Storm
features.description: Add Int mod to Initiative. Move up to your Speed when you roll Initiative.

features.name: Multidiscipline
features.description: Add half your Proficiency Bonus to any saving throw that doesn't already use it.

features.name: Pawn Wall
features.description: When you deal damage with a cantrip, you and 2 allies within 5ft gain Resistance to that damage type until your next turn.

features.name: Fundamental Mastery
features.description: Once per turn, treat one damage die of a Warmage cantrip as its maximum value.

features.name: Rook Strike
features.description: Bonus Action: Gain Advantage on an attack/check or impose Disadvantage on a save against your cantrip (Int mod uses per rest).

features.name: Arcane Acrobat
features.description: Gain proficiency in Acrobatics, Sleight of Hand, or Stealth. Add Int mod to all Dexterity checks.

features.name: Covert Magic
features.description: Cast specific spells (Invisibility, etc.) once per Long Rest without slots or Verbal components. Regain by spending Arcane Surge.

features.name: Fleeting Decoy
features.description: Reaction (when damaged): Attacks against you have Disadvantage until your next turn.

features.name: Elusive Step
features.description: If you move 5+ feet, subsequent movement doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks.

features.name: Arcane Assassin
features.description: Cast Greater Invisibility on yourself once per Long Rest. Double your Speed while Invisible.

tricks.name: Blackjack
tricks.description: When you fail a D20 test, roll another d20 and add it. If total > 21, you fail. Once per Initiative/Rest.

tricks.name: Blasting Cantrip
tricks.description: Once per turn, Force damage cantrips push targets 10 feet.

tricks.name: Blinding Light
tricks.description: Casting Light can Blind a creature within 10 feet (Con save).

tricks.name: Corrosive Cantrip
tricks.description: Once per turn, Acid damage cantrips reduce target's AC by half your level (max -5) for the next attack.

tricks.name: Draining Cantrip
tricks.description: Dealing Necrotic/Poison damage grants Temp HP equal to half your level for 1 minute.

tricks.name: Explosive Cantrip
tricks.description: Once per turn, Fire damage cantrips create a 5ft explosion (Dex save for half damage).

tricks.name: Field Medic
tricks.description: Learn Spare the Dying. Casting it on 0 HP creature restores 1 HP and grants Temp HP. Once per Long Rest.

tricks.name: Infinite Variation
tricks.description: Use Prestidigitation to emulate any non-damaging cantrip (DC 15 Arcana check).

tricks.name: Mystical Armor
tricks.description: Cast Mage Armor on yourself without a slot. Use Intelligence for AC.

tricks.name: Mystical Retort
tricks.description: Learn Vicious Mockery. Reaction: Cast it on an attacker to impose Disadvantage on their current attack. Once per Rest.

tricks.name: Split Fire
tricks.description: Split damage dice of a single-target cantrip among multiple creatures.
